mapper.select: SELECT widget_code, title, description, default_w, default_h, category, active FROM platform_v3.db_widget WHERE active = TRUE ORDER BY category, widget_code

SELECT u.id, u.employee_no, u.widget_code, w.title, w.description, w.category, u.pos_x, u.pos_y, u.width, u.height, u.config_json, u.sort_order FROM platform_v3.db_user_widget u JOIN platform_v3.db_widget w ON w.widget_code = u.widget_code WHERE u.employee_no = #{employeeNo} AND w.active = TRUE ORDER BY u.sort_order, u.pos_y, u.pos_x, u.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.db_user_widget (employee_no, widget_code, pos_x, pos_y, width, height, config_json, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{employeeNo}, #{widgetCode}, COALESCE(#{posX}, 0), COALESCE(#{posY}, 0), COALESCE(#{width}, 3), COALESCE(#{height}, 1), CAST(#{configJson} AS JSONB), COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (employee_no, widget_code) DO UPDATE SET pos_x = EXCLUDED.pos_x, pos_y = EXCLUDED.pos_y, width = EXCLUDED.width, height = EXCLUDED.height, config_json = EXCLUDED.config_json, sort_order = EXCLUDED.sort_order, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE platform_v3.db_user_widget SET pos_x = COALESCE(#{posX}, pos_x), pos_y = COALESCE(#{posY}, pos_y), width = COALESCE(#{width}, width), height = COALESCE(#{height}, height), config_json = COALESCE(CAST(#{configJson} AS JSONB), config_json), sort_order = COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, sort_order), updated_at = NOW() WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo} AND widget_code = #{widgetCode}
